ranking_method: cosine similarity using ResNet34 image embeddings
confidence_safeguards: style and type confidence thresholds set to 0.60
main_observation: the improved type model reduced same-actual-type recommendation issues from 2 to 0 on the selected examples
main_limitation: style prediction errors remain and can still cause the recommender to retrieve the wrong style category
next_step: build a stronger recommendation evaluation framework or improve the style classifier with boundary examples
